# 🍜 Spice & Rice




A modern and responsive Asian restaurant landing page built with **React**, **Vite**, **Tailwind CSS**, and **Framer Motion**. The website offers a clean design, smooth animations, and an engaging user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

---

---

## ✨ Features

- Modern and elegant UI
- Fully responsive layout
- Smooth animations with Framer Motion
- Hero section with Call-to-Action
- About section
- Popular dishes showcase
- Customer testimonials
- Contact information
- Fast loading with Vite

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- React
- Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- JavaScript (ES6+)

---

## 📂 Project Structure

```text
spice-rice/
├── assets/
│   └── screenshots/
├── public/
├── src/
│   ├── assets/
│   ├── Layout/
│   ├── Page/
│   ├── App.jsx
│   └── main.jsx
├── package.json
├── vite.config.js
├── tailwind.config.js
├── README.md
└── .gitignore
```

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/alacp-prog/spice-rice-.git
```

Go to the project folder

```bash
cd spice-rice-
```

Install dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

Start the development server

```bash
npm run dev
```

---

## 📱 Responsive Design

The application is optimized for:

- 💻 Desktop
- 📱 Mobile
- 📲 Tablet

---

## 🎯 Future Improvements

- Online reservation system
- Food filtering by category
- Dark mode
- Backend integration
- Multi-language support
